message:
feat(python): numpy.angle wrapper parity (franken_numpy-jko2)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.angle(z, deg=False) so the
complex-argument angle matches numpy across scalar (1+0j → 0,
0+1j → π/2, -1+0j → π), 1-D complex array, deg=True returning
degrees, real input (positive→0, negative→π), and 2-D complex
element-wise.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
